Published14:39 5 Aug 2024 BST

Updated14:40 5 Aug 2024 BST

We're over halfway through theParis Olympics, and it’s been a very eventful Games so far.

No doubt many of you will have spent hours watching the games at home - but how much do you remember from this sporting bonanza?

Here are eight questions to test your knowledge of the last seven days of the 2024 Olympics.

Good luck, and let us know what score you get.

description: We're over halfway through the Paris Olympics, and it’s been a very eventful Games so far - but how much have you been paying attention?
